name: talentclaw
description: talentclaw — your AI career agent. Local-first career hub + platform-agnostic agent skills.
author: Jeffrey Blue (https://github.com/artemysone)

scripts.dev:desktop: tsdown desktop/main.ts desktop/preload.ts --out-dir dist-electron --format cjs --external electron --external electron-updater --external @electron/notarize && electron dist-electron/main.cjs
scripts.build:desktop: next build && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static && cp -r public .next/standalone/public && sh scripts/strip-standalone.sh && tsdown desktop/main.ts desktop/preload.ts --out-dir dist-electron --format cjs --external electron --external electron-updater --external @electron/notarize && electron-builder --mac --config desktop/electron-builder.config.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: rm -rf .next dist && npm run build && tsdown bin/cli.ts --out-dir dist --format esm --platform node && sh scripts/strip-standalone.sh
